> Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add github/awesome-copilot --skill sql-code-review --skill secret-scanning -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/sql-code-review`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from authoring SSOT `docs/src/authoring/skills/sql-code-review.mdx` and `docs/public/generated-registries/skills-catalog-index.json` by `wagents docs generate`.
 Legacy projection `config/external-skills.md` remains dual-read during migration.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add github/awesome-copilot --skill sql-code-review --skill secret-scanning -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Inspect first** (`needs-inspection`)

Curated status: `inspect-then-install`

Risk notes: Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Universal SQL code review assistant that performs comprehensive security, maintainability, and code quality analysis across all SQL databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, Oracle). Focuses on SQL injection prevention, access control, code standards, and anti-pattern detection.

## Install Prerequisites

Install: `npx skills add github/awesome-copilot --skill sql-code-review --skill secret-scanning -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode` status=inspect-then-install; selector=named

## Upstream Maintainer

[github/awesome-copilot](https://github.com/github/awesome-copilot)

## Comparable Alternatives

`sql-optimization` complements for perf; `code-review` for general.

&gt; Web-augmented from public upstream SKILL.md (github raw fetches) and curated config/external-skills.md; use external-skill-auditor for live evidence and script/hook audit. Not an endorsement. Confidence 0.75 derived from metadata alignment + source inspection depth.
